security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://esm.sh; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost http://localhost:1940; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1940 ws: wss: https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
